---
title: "Materials"
sidebar: true
---

## Overview

This section contains all learning materials for the course.
Complete the **Pre-requisites** before Day 1, then follow the course in order.

---

## Pre-requisites

Complete these setup steps **before the first session**:

1. [Software Setup](prerequisites/software.qmd) — Stata, R, Python, Positron, Quarto, Git, UV
2. [GitHub](prerequisites/github.qmd) — account, WB org membership, Copilot access
3. [Positron Extensions](prerequisites/extensions.qmd) — Stata MCP extension
4. [Positron Assistant](prerequisites/assistant.qmd) — connect GitHub, enable AI
5. [Licenses & Access](prerequisites/licenses.qmd) — Copilot quotas and WB budget
6. [Common Problems](prerequisites/common-problems.qmd) — UV, access denied, Positron update

---

## Day 1 — Introduction to AI-Assisted Coding

**3-hour in-person / hybrid session**

- [Session Overview](day1/index.qmd)
- [Opening Demo: Refactoring With and Without AI](day1/demo-refactoring.qmd)
- [AI Overview](day1/ai-overview.qmd) — how LLMs work, strengths/limits, responsible use, prompting
- [Case Studies](day1/case-studies.qmd) — code refactoring and reproducibility packages

---

## Self-Study Period

**2–3 days of independent practice between sessions**

- [Overview & Instructions](self-study/index.qmd)
- [Case Studies](self-study/case-studies.qmd) — reproduce old code, reproduce from example, try a new language

---

## Day 2 — Everyday AI-Assisted Coding

**3-hour in-person / hybrid session**

- [Session Overview](day2/index.qmd)
- [Advanced Topics](day2/advanced-topics.qmd) — prompt engineering, cost, Git workflow, agents and skills
- [Case Studies](day2/case-studies.qmd) — complex task planning, testing & debugging, Positron Data Bot
